introSection: Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at JuraPark Solec in Solec Kujawski, Kujawsko-Pomorskie, Poland.

sections.title: Train
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at JuraPark Solec in Solec Kujawski, Kujawsko-Pomorskie, Poland.



Yellow track and unpainted supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
